masterObjectives.title: Establish GenAI talent advisory as the market-leading offering
masterObjectives.description: Position Accenture as the definitive leader in GenAI-driven talent transformation advisory, with differentiated methodology, proven client outcomes, and market recognition.

masterObjectives.title: Expand presence and revenue in APAC and LATAM markets
masterObjectives.description: Accelerate growth in underpenetrated APAC and LATAM markets through targeted hiring, local partnerships, and adapted offering portfolio.

masterObjectives.title: Drive 15% profitability improvement across all offerings
masterObjectives.description: Improve margin performance through delivery optimization, pricing discipline, and strategic use of delivery centers and managed services.

masterObjectives.title: Build and launch next-gen workforce planning capability
masterObjectives.description: Develop and productize an AI-powered workforce planning platform that integrates skills data, demand forecasting, and scenario modeling.

masterObjectives.title: Unify talent strategy messaging and methodology globally
masterObjectives.description: Create a single, consistent talent strategy methodology and brand narrative that all markets and industries deploy, replacing fragmented local approaches.

masterObjectives.title: Increase client retention and expansion revenue by 20%
masterObjectives.description: Grow existing client accounts through proactive relationship management, cross-sell of new offerings, and measurable outcome tracking.
